intended_use: StrokeSENS LVO is a radiological computer-aided triage and notification (CADt) software indicated for use in the analysis of CTA head images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and tra
intended_use_full: StrokeSENS LVO is a radiological computer-aided triage and notification (CADt) software indicated for use in the analysis of CTA head images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained clinicians in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive findings of Large Vessel Occlusion (LVO) in head CTA images.
target_condition: Large Vessel Occlusion (LVO) in acute ischemic stroke
ground_truth: Not explicitly stated; clinical reference standard for LVO status inferred from case labeling (217 LVO cases and 183 non-LVO cases)
other_metrics: Processing time - Mean: 0.75 minutes (S.D: ±0.17 mins, Min: 0.46 mins, Max: 1.23 mins); 95% CI for sensitivity [85.3%, 93.5%]; 95% CI for specificity [82.6%, 92.2%]
